name: Nexentis Technologies Inc.
summary: Part I Company Overview We were incorporated in the State of Delaware on April 1, 2009 under the name Pimi Agro Cleantech, Inc. On April 11, 2016, we changed our name from Pimi Agro Cleantech, Inc. to Save Foods, Inc., on March 19, 2024 we changed our name to N2OFF, Inc., and on February 26, 2026, we changed our name to Nexentis Technologies Inc. Effective November 10, 2023, we merged with and into our wholly-owned Nevada subsidiary for the purpose of reincorporating in the State of Nevada. Our ...
